message:
Add task_list tool for persistent task management

New tool available to all provider profiles. Supports three actions:
- view: show all tasks with IDs, descriptions, prompts, and statuses
- append: add new tasks with brief description and detailed prompt
- update: change task status (done/undone/cancelled)

Tasks persist to .serf/tasks.json, survive across session resumes.
IDs are monotonically increasing and tasks can never be deleted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
